name: One-Dish Pork Chops with Rice
recipeInstructions:
Use 3/4 pound hot sausage instead of pork chops if you prefer.
1. Heat the oil in a skillet that can go into the oven; add onions, green peppers and rice. Saute until rice is translucent.
2. Add sugar and tomatoes; blend.
3. Top with pork chops and then cheese. Bake, covered, in a preheated 350-degree oven for about 1 hour. Uncover and carefully stir the rice mixture after 50 minutes.
